description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a sporty appearance, featuring a short-sleeved athletic top and matching shorts. The figure wears fingerless gloves and sneakers, and has a whistle and lanyard around the neck, suggesting a coach or athletic trainer role. The hair is short and tousled, and the face is expressive with defined features. The arms are extended horizontally, and the figure's build is muscular and athletic. The back of the shirt displays some text or symbols, and the overall posture is upright and alert. Accessories such as wristbands and a whistle add to the athletic theme.
description: A muscular adult pedestrian in athletic attire with fingerless gloves, sneakers, and a whistle, posed with arms outstretched. The figure has short, tousled hair and a sporty, coach-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, whistle, lanyard, and full details of the athletic top and gloves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the outstretched arm, and the layered hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt with visible text or symbols, and the back of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, outstretched arm, and the layered hair from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with short-sleeved top, shorts, and fingerless gloves, accessorized with a whistle and wristbands
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
